message:
feat: enhance CLI spawn command and configuration handling

CLI Commands:
- cli/root.go: Improved root command initialization and flag handling
- cli/spawn.go: Enhanced spawn command with better tmux session
  management and agent coordination support

Configuration:
- config/config.go: Refined configuration loading and validation
  with support for new spawn options
- config/config_test.go: Updated tests for configuration changes

These changes improve ntm's ability to manage multi-agent tmux
sessions with more reliable spawning and cleaner configuration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
